name: Render Strategy
summary: Conformance reference for how a component's element tree updates over time. Defines the CustomRenderStrategy contract (readonly key + mount/update/dispose, RenderInput tagged union keyed by strategy id), a per-scope provider registry (nearest-scope wins), and the four registered strategies (declarative-static, vdom, fine-grained, imperative). Re-render is strategy-owned: the strategy subscribes to its own reactivity source, the host never calls update(). The sibling of Change Tracking: change strategies detect, render strategies commit. Technical contract, not a UX preference — a Protocol, not an Intent.
